hero.title: FRPD DataHub
hero.description: The central repository for high-fidelity economic data, longitudinal surveys, and interactive visualization tools designed to support evidence-based policy making.

resources.title: National GDP Growth Indicators (2010-2025)
resources.description: Standardized longitudinal dataset covering annual growth rates, inflation, and sector-wise contributions to the national economy.

resources.title: Proprietary Consumer Sentiment Index
resources.description: High-frequency localized data reflecting household spending patterns and economic expectations across 15 major urban centers.

resources.title: Household Economic Resilience Survey (HERS)
resources.description: Microdata from our comprehensive 2024 survey of 10,000 households regarding financial shocks and coping mechanisms.

resources.title: Interactive Trade Dynamics Dashboard
resources.description: Real-time visualization of import-export flows, trade balance indicators, and global market correlations.

resources.title: Annual Macroeconomic Outlook 2026
resources.description: Comprehensive analysis of fiscal trends, monetary policy impacts, and growth projections for the upcoming fiscal year.

resources.title: FRPD Econometric Toolbox for R
resources.description: Custom R-scripts and packages developed by our data science wing for advanced policy modeling and impact evaluation.

resources.title: Custom Data Procurement & Analytics
resources.description: If you require specific indicators or specialized datasets not listed here, our data team can provide custom solutions.
